# Cartesian Meditations

*[Husserl](../philosophers/husserl.md) · 1931 · *Cartesianische Meditationen**

A reprise of the Cartesian move freed from substance metaphysics: Husserl grounds phenomenology on the transcendental ego and devotes the fifth meditation to the problem of the other, that is, to the constitution of intersubjectivity.
